Stiletto Web - LLM Access Guide

Purpose
- Stiletto Web is a community knowledge and utility site for Last Oasis.
- It provides reliable game data for crafting, items, creatures, maps, clans, trades, and tools.

Main Sections
- Home: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/
- Wiki (search/index): https://stiletto.deeme.dev/wiki
- Item detail pages: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/item/<item_name>
- Creature detail pages: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/creature/<creature_name>
- Crafter: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/crafter
- Maps: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/map
- Tech tree: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/tech

Source of Truth
- Main structured datasets: /public/json/**
- Item index dataset: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/json/items_min.json
- Creature index dataset: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/json/creatures_min.json
- Full item detail datasets: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/json/items/
- Full creature detail datasets: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/json/creatures/
- Canonical URLs are generated from route patterns in the frontend router.

Usage and License
- Repository package license is marked as UNLICENSED.
- Content should be treated as all rights reserved unless explicit permission is granted by maintainers.
- For reuse, attribution, or redistribution requests, contact maintainers through repository issues.

Contact
- Website: https://stiletto.deeme.dev
- Repository: https://github.com/dm94/stiletto-web
- Issues: https://github.com/dm94/stiletto-web/issues

Discovery Links
- Sitemap: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/sitemap.xml
- Wiki: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/wiki
- Items: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/item
- Creatures: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/creature
- Public API (project): https://github.com/dm94/stiletto-node-api
